omopColumns.name: nhs_number
omopColumns.query:
select
		distinct
  			replace(NHS_Number, ' ', '') as NHSNumber,
      		SACT_Administration_Route as Administration_Route,
		  	Administration_Date
	from omop_staging.sact_staging

omopColumns.name: observation_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `4106215`. Route of administration value

omopColumns.name: observation_date

dataSource.name: Administration_Date
dataSource.description: SYSTEMIC ANTI-CANCER THERAPY ADMINISTRATION DATE is the date of the Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy Drug Administration or the date an oral drug was initially dispensed to the PATIENT.

omopColumns.name: observation_type_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `32818`. EHR administration record

omopColumns.name: value_as_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: The ADMINISTRATION ROUTE of the DRUG used for each Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy Drug Administration in a Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy Drug Cycle.

dataSource.name: Administration_Route
dataSource.description: The prescribed route of administration for each Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy Drug Administration in a Systemic Anti-Cancer Therapy Drug Cycle.

origins.origin: SYSTEMIC ANTI-CANCER THERAPY DRUG ROUTE OF ADMINISTRATION

omopColumns.query:
select
		distinct
  			replace(NHS_Number, ' ', '') as NHSNumber,
      		SACT_Administration_Route as Administration_Route,
		  	Administration_Date
	from omop_staging.sact_staging
